programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un frigorifero, un tostapane, un copertone e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un puzzle, un trenino, un cestino e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a una lampadina, una piastra, un Forza 4 e altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky suonano uno strumento a corde. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Poyo saltano più e più volte da un divertente trampolino rosa. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky scoprono un oggetto divertente con dei quadrati illuminati. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Una nuova orsetta di nome Unione sta per diventare un'Orsetta del Cuore ufficiale quando Allegra rompe accidentalmente la pietra magica necessaria per scegliere il suo colore! Gli orsetti si avventurano in una caverna mistica piena di enigmi e trappole per trovare una nuova pietra.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Brontolorso viene colto da un temporale magico che lo fa ingrandire ogni volta che si arrabbia. E ogni volta che cresce, si arrabbia di più! Gli Orsetti del Cuore devono lavorare insieme per trovare una soluzione prima che Brontolorso diventi troppo grande per il loro mondo!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Fortunello e Splendente catturano un magico Amico Stellare che concede loro mille desideri! All'inizio è divertente, ma i loro continui desideri causano così tanti problemi che vorrebbero non aver mai iniziato!

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato progetta una macchina per la trasformazione genetica e il suo nipotino di soli 4 anni si trasforma accidentalmente in un uomo di 30. Il "Bambino" sfugge e corre intorno alla città rincorso dai fratelli che fanno di tutto per recuperarlo prima dell'arrivo dei propri genitori.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Il tesoro di Whittmore
programme.desc: Albie e Tiffany vengono mandati a casa della zia per le vacanze. Qui i ragazzi conoscono un gruppo di bizzarri coetanei emarginati, impegnati nella ricerca di un fantomatico tesoro.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: A Plumm Summer - Una magica estate
programme.desc: Froggie Doo, pupazzo animato protagonista di un fortunato spettacolo televisivo, viene rapito. Due fratellini, Elliott e Rocky Plumm, aiutano l'FBI nelle indagini per recuperare il proprio eroe.

programme.title: Il regno di Wuba
programme.desc: Uomini e mostri non possono convivere in armonia: i primi, per paura o per diletto, finiranno sempre per andare a caccia dei secondi. Consapevole di questo, la Regina dei Mostri, incinta e minacciata di morte, fa di tutto per preservare la salute del nascituro.

programme.title: The Amazing Wizard Of Paws
programme.desc: Al compimento dei dodici anni, un ragazzo che soffre di ansia in modo patologico scopre che il suo cane ha seicento anni e che era stato precedentemente di proprietà di un potente mago.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider del Villaggio di Hakum si preparano per indagare sul rapimento di Avinia da parte dei misteriosi Rider Oscuri. Che cosa vogliono da lei?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale, dei Rider Oscuri, attacca Lute per prendergli la Gemma della Fratellanza. Visti i poteri del suo Monstie, la squadra parte per incontrare il Wyveriano, ovvero "L'Evocatore".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un altro membro degli Ebon Rider minaccia il nuovo Rider del Villaggio di Hakum, mentre Lute e i suoi amici incontrano un vecchio amico e scoprono il "Rito dell'Evocazione".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mentre cercano Avinia, Cheval e Cryo si imbattono in un altro Ebon Rider, Shadow, il cui Nargacuga si muove più veloce della luce.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Nariki, stanco da una sessione di allenamento e da una discussione con il suo Monstie, incontra inaspettatamente l'ultimo dei Quattro Sommi Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Debli è deciso a fare la sua parte nell'operazione di salvataggio della sua amica Avinia e si prepara per il Rito di Evocazione. Aspetta, ma da quando è un Rider?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute sa esattamente quale mostro vorrebbe usare per il suo primo Rito di Evocazione. Nel frattempo, i Rider Oscuri fanno di tutto per trovarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È il turno di Cheval di andare a cercare un potente mostro per aumentare le abilità di Rathi, ma non è pronto per la lunga e fredda traversata delle Distese Innevate di Darj.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Jumbo
programme.desc: Jumbo è un elefante che vive su un'isola, è molto intelligente e riesce a sillabare qualsiasi parola. Ogni anno si indice una gara dove partecipano numerosi animali, ciascun partecipante deve sillabare una parola senza sbagliare.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: A Plumm Summer - Una magica estate
programme.desc: Froggie Doo, pupazzo animato protagonista di un fortunato spettacolo televisivo, viene rapito. Due fratellini, Elliott e Rocky Plumm, aiutano l'FBI nelle indagini per recuperare il proprio eroe.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Il tesoro di Whittmore
programme.desc: Albie e Tiffany vengono mandati a casa della zia per le vacanze. Qui i ragazzi conoscono un gruppo di bizzarri coetanei emarginati, impegnati nella ricerca di un fantomatico tesoro.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: The Amazing Wizard Of Paws
programme.desc: Al compimento dei dodici anni, un ragazzo che soffre di ansia in modo patologico scopre che il suo cane ha seicento anni e che era stato precedentemente di proprietà di un potente mago.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Essential Air Guitar: Killer Riffs
programme.desc: From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Greatest Albums
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite songs behind 30 of the greatest rock album covers ever! Featuring The Beatles & Queen, The Stones & Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Rock Ballads: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 80s was an amazing decade for rock ballads from Bon Jovi to Bonnie Tyler, Chicago to Cher. Relive a decade of the biggest rock ballads in order.

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Rock Icons
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Hardest Hitters!
programme.desc: The 30 greatest rock drummers in the world! These are Nicky's hardest hitters featuring Dave Grohl, Tommy Lee, Keith Moon, Ginger Baker, John Bonham but who is his Number 1?

programme.title: High School Rock Out: 1995-2005
programme.desc: We open the high school year book with Weezer in 1995 and remember the amazing bands that rocked every school party through to 2005!

programme.title: 30 Rock & Indie Heroes of the 10s
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Linkin Park: Fan Favourites
programme.desc: Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!

programme.title: Turn Up The Emo Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Dumbass Anthems: 2000-2007
programme.desc: 25 All-Killer 00s Dumbass Anthems! From Blink-182 and Wheatus to Fall Out Boy and Scouting For Girls.

programme.title: Maxed Out On Anthems!
programme.desc: Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring Paramore, Imagine Dragons, Linkin Park, Evanescense & The Arctic Monkeys. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Rock 'n' Roll Top 3s: 1990-1999
programme.desc: A 2 hour run through, in order, of top 3 hits from the 90s - all with that rock n roll swagger! Expect plenty of U2, Def Leppard, Meat Loaf & Brit Pop!.

programme.title: The New Legends Of Rock

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: Viaggi di spirito Puglia
programme.desc: Altamura - Accolto da Tommy Colonna, Julian parte all’esplorazione del mondo dei distillati di Gravina e di Altamura. Si comincia con rosolio e amaro, si continua con un nocino e con un drink.

programme.title: Parola di chef S9
programme.desc: Giovanni Buondonno - Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficolta', aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Dolcemente
programme.desc: S13 - Il volto dolce del Gambero Rosso, Maurizio Santin, ci insegna a realizzare dolci originali e creativi per deliziare il palato di tutti.

programme.title: Le grandi cantine
programme.desc: Rocca di Castagnoli - Un tour nelle più importanti famiglie di viticultori italiani. Uomini che hanno creduto in un sogno e lo hanno trasformato in realtà e che hanno dedicato la vita al lavoro in vigna. Storie di vecchie e nuove generazioni di vignaioli.

programme.title: Max alla brace
programme.desc: S.1 - Max Mariola in cortile alle prese con un bbq. Ricette gustose e originali da realizzare nel giardino di casa o per passare qualche ora all’aperto

programme.title: Giorgione Ricette dal mio libro
programme.desc: Lasagnetta di primavera - Patate ripiene. Giorgione dedica un libro e delle ricette ai giovani chef che vogliono cominciare a mettere le mani in pasta, perche' coltivare e cucinare e' un gioco da ragazzi.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S10
programme.desc: Trippa dei BIcocchi e crocchette di riso - Il ricettario in dialetto bolognese di Roberto è un vero forziere. Custodisce le ricette della tradizione che i Bicocchi rivisitano a loro modo.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Pensieri in barattolo
programme.desc: Delicato sorrentino - Peppe Guida riesce a mettere in barattolo qualsiasi cosa, dalle marmellate ai pomodori, ai sughi pronti, al ragu'. Un mondo che accompagna da sempre la sua cucina.

programme.title: Puglia food stories
programme.desc: Una focaccia, un uomo, un bambino. Sono questi i ricordi che Bari e una focaccia barese fanno riaffiorare nella mente di Domingo mentre passeggia tra i vicoli della città vecchia.

programme.title: Le ricette di Mai
programme.desc: La cucina giapponese per tutti: ricette semplici e piccoli segreti di Mai Shinohara.

programme.title: Cheese Hunters S1
programme.desc: Ep1 - A bordo del loro sidecar, Eleonora e Fiorenzo partono per la prima tappa dell’avventura. Si va nelle Langhe da Renato, dalle sue capre e dai suoi formaggi

programme.title: Il gusto di Igles le origini
programme.desc: Cefalo - Comacchio. Igles parte alla ricerca del cefalo per le sue ricette. Incontra vecchi amici che ha lasciato tempo fa. Dopo un breve giro in città, si pesca e si cucina.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Max cucina l'estate
programme.desc: S.2 - Le ricette di Max per l'estate. idee e consigli pratici per piatti veloci, leggeri e gustosi.

programme.title: Giorgione Ricette dal mio libro
programme.desc: Sbriciolata - Ravioli di spinaci. Giorgione dedica un libro e delle ricette ai giovani chef che vogliono cominciare a mettere le mani in pasta, perche' coltivare e cucinare e' un gioco da ragazzi.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S10
programme.desc: Rotolo romagnolo- Un ospite in cucina. In questo episodio Pia una cara amica di Vito prepara una ricetta molto particolare. Un rotolo ripieno

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Peru'
programme.desc: Lima ep2 - Biodiversità, civiltà e l’influenza delle altre culture sono alla base della cucina peruviana. Una cucina di uomini e donne che ogni giorno portano nei piatti la biodiversità e la gente di questo paese.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Cheese - a staple in traditional Greek cuisine! Talented home cook Joanna Chery fries up two delicious ap- petizers called Saganaki, both featuring two different types of cheese. First, she fries up kefaltyri, a hard, salty cheese in a dramatic burning flame of ouzo (licorice-flavoured alcohol) - Opa! Then, Joanna shows us a popular Fried Shrimp and Cheese appetizer using tasty feta and tender shrimp. Pair both dishes with a Greek rustic bread and you've nailed it! Next up, Joanna prepares a Greek classic - Spanakopita. This mouth-watering dish is made up of creamy ricotta, crispy phyllo pastry, fresh spinach, and a hint of dill (yum!). Moving on, Joanna showcases her all-time favourite...

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Crispy, crunchy, salty, and sweet - Chef Spencer Watts prepares a Spring-inspired Thai feast in under 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up homey classics including a mouth-watering Chicken Stew and melt-in-your-mouth Herb Butter Biscuits.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up an Italian feast for four including a cheesy Cannelloni and a fast and fluffy Tiramisu.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It's pub night in Spencer Watts' kitchen! Forget going out - Spencer's pub recipes are bold in flavour and mild on the wallet!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: China celebrates harvest with the Moon Festival, when the moon is at its fullest during mid-autumn. The best part? A delicious feast! Cantonese expert Mary Tang prepares a common Moon Festival dish - earthy and tasty Mushroom Stir Fry. Then, she cooks up a mouth-watering, Cantonese must-have - Steamed Crab. Using flawless technique, Mary breaks the juicy crab into pieces, fries and steams it in scented spices and sauces. Another Moon Festival staple is Cantonese Roast Duck - Mary uses sweet-savoury Chinese five-spice powder, dark soy sauce, and aromatic white pepper to make a fragrant rub. Finally, Moon Cake at the Moon Festival a given. Exquisitely crafted with red bean paste and sweet...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Elegant Vietnamese fare is often inspired by legendary imperial city cuisine. In this One World Kitchen 3 episode, Host Lisa Nguyen gives us a magical taste of royalty with four colourful and delectable dishes. To start, Lisa ex- quisitely assembles a nice little starter for a royal dinner party - delicious Rice Cakes with Dried Shrimp. Next, she kicks it up a notch with a Spicy Hue Beef Noodle Soup - a truly slurp-worthy dish! For a touch of sweetness, Lisa then steams caramelized pork and tender shrimp dumplings in a lovely banana leaf. And there's no such thing as a classy Vietnamese dinner party without Baby Clams with Rice! The blend of contrasting flavours and textures in this...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Spices are extremely important to Lebanese cuisine and host Jasmin Ibrahim uses a ton of them in four tasty Lebanese dishes. First, she prepares two classic, aromatic toppings for a Lebanese breakfast bread called Mana- keesh. Next up, juicy chicken and smokey freekah seasoned with sweet cinnamon, citrusy cardamom, pungent all spice, and black peppercorns. This dish captures the essence of Lebanese cuisine. Moving on, Jasmin then makes a thick and spicy beef stew. It's eaten vermicelli rice and seasoned with a classic Lebanese 7-spice combo. Fragrant and delicious, this dish can be served family-style for everyone to enjoy! For dessert, Jasmin whips up a wonderfully rich batch of Spiced...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Home cook Joanna Chery prepares a series of traditional Greek dishes including Stuffed Vine Leaves - a classic dish made of lemon-doused grape leaves and stuffed with fluffy rice, fragrant herbs, and juicy beef. Then, she prepares a healthy and hearty dish called Giant Baked Beans. Typically used as a side, it pairs well with Jo- anna's next dish - succulent roast lamb and lemony potatoes. Finally, Joanna makes a Greek specialty - Fried Dough Ribbons. Satisfy your sweet tooth with these fried, coiled dough ribbons drizzled with sweet honey and sprinkled with sugar. Simple, fun, and evERS-popular in Greek cuisine, this dish is great for sharing amongst family and friends.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In under 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up four hearty, rich, and mouth-watering French-Canadian dishes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, host Spencer Watts cooks up a feast for four that's full of Mexican flavours!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: A Moroccan meal in 30 minutes? That's right! Spencer Watts inspires with Moroccan dishes that are quick to make and bold in flavour.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts offers up his tips and tricks for a classic Burger and Fries dinner with a healthy twist.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a Mediterranean mezze-themed menu with a table to match! There's kofta, hummus, tabbouleh, fattoush, muhammara, and so much more!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam - Vietnamese Green Beans, Lebanon - Watermelon Tabbouleh, China - Signapore-Style Spaghetti Squash Noodles, and Germany - Celeriac Sauerbraten and Slaw!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: The ultimate childhood comfort food, Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup! Missy Hui takes this dish up with a basil- infused tomato soup that's ubERS-creamy and fresh! Don't forget the grilled cheese - gooey Havarti, provolone, and cheddar ooze out of this sandwich for an ultra-indulgent dish. Tiera Singh's twist on toast and tomatoes? Panzanella Salad! Ripe, seasonal tomatoes are tossed with a tangy capERS-vinegar dressing that is soaked up by crunchy croutons. Going higher? Micah Trainor's Seared Halloumi and Glazed Fruit grills the cheese - no bread needed! Seared halloumi is topped with bourbon-glazed fruit for a savoury-sweet vegetarian dish. Poppy Sandler's Lobster Roll with Sweet Corn...

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing brunch! Josh makes congee and dumplings while Erica prepares a Middle Eastern spread!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Eggs are a perfect beginning for so many recipes and meals; Chef-host Katie Ardington is happy to "whisk" us along through a few of her favourites!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a Mediterranean mezze-themed menu with a table to match! There's kofta, hummus, tabbouleh, fattoush, muhammara, and so much more!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam - Vietnamese Green Beans, Lebanon - Watermelon Tabbouleh, China - Signapore-Style Spaghetti Squash Noodles, and Germany - Celeriac Sauerbraten and Slaw!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: The ultimate childhood comfort food, Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup! Missy Hui takes this dish up with a basil- infused tomato soup that's ubERS-creamy and fresh! Don't forget the grilled cheese - gooey Havarti, provolone, and cheddar ooze out of this sandwich for an ultra-indulgent dish. Tiera Singh's twist on toast and tomatoes? Panzanella Salad! Ripe, seasonal tomatoes are tossed with a tangy capERS-vinegar dressing that is soaked up by crunchy croutons. Going higher? Micah Trainor's Seared Halloumi and Glazed Fruit grills the cheese - no bread needed! Seared halloumi is topped with bourbon-glazed fruit for a savoury-sweet vegetarian dish. Poppy Sandler's Lobster Roll with Sweet Corn...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.desc: Showcasing a small tropical island encircled by crystal-clear turquoise waters called Bulog Dos Island in the Philippines.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Malini Angelica Menorca
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Menorca, from Mahon’s markets and history to Ciutadella’s gothic charm and northern beaches. In Es Migjorn Gran, she hikes to ancient caves, visits Binigaus beach, and also learns to make Mahon style cheese.

programme.title: Med Whats On Extraordinary Events
programme.desc: Spring is transforming the Mediterranean into a massive stage for high-tech art and spectacular outdoor events. We begin at the Ta Qali National Park for the Bloom Festival, where wellness and music create a vibrant sanctuary in the heart of Malta. From there, we head into the tunnels and forts of Valletta and Birgu for the Malta Biennale 2026 to discover contemporary installations hidden inside historic sites rarely seen by the public. Our journey takes us to the cliffs of Gozo as giant creative designs fill the sky for the International Kite and Wind Festival before we land in Venice to witness the world class creativity of the 61st International Art Exhibition. This is a look at a region in the middle of a stunning cultural rebirth.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: The Odyssey on Odysseus Trail
programme.desc: Ten years after the sack of Troy, Zeus is alone on Olympus, with only his daughter Athena remaining at his side. She tries to convince her father to help Odysseus, the last Greek fighter who has not yet returned home to Ithaca.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: CONCERTO - Federico Fellini 100
programme.desc: From the Rai Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Marcello Rota and featuring soprano Cristina Mosca, celebrates 100 years since the birth of Fellini. The concert features iconic soundtracks composed by Nino Rota for Fellini's films, including La Strada, Prova d'orchestra, and Satyricon.

programme.title: Jesenice

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Verona I della Scala
programme.desc: This episode tells Verona’s story through the rise and fall of the Della Scala family, pioneers of the Italian Renaissance. From Cangrande to Mastino II, we follow their power struggle with Venice, booming trade, and eventual exile to Bavaria.

programme.title: The Odyssey the Man Who Defied the Gods
programme.desc: Devastated by the meaningless of the war on Troy, Odysseus is angry at the Gods for having stood by and let the carnage unfurl. All he wants to do is go home. But his journey will be an odyssey...

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO
programme.desc: In the final moments of Madama Butterfly, Cio-Cio-San sings "Tu, tu, piccolo Iddio", a tender farewell to her son before making the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the rugged heart of the Peruvian Andes, Milagros sets out on an exhilarating adventure in Huascaran National Park.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Join our host as he starts his backpacking journey of Portugal, starting from Lisbon. Exploring important monuments from Belem tower to Portas Do Sol.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Cairo, the sprawling and impressive Egyptian capital, has a rich history that goes beyond books and continues to the present day.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra starts her journey from Tsomoriri where on the way she stops at Baralacha Pass. Later she visits Korzok village, interacts with locals and dresses up in a traditional Ladakhi attire.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Israel's art scene, which has been overlooked by the art world for years, is now on the rise.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: Traditional Hungarian fare is a hearty affair, not meant for the faint-hearted. The cuisine has imbibed influences from the days of its Ottoman occupation as well as from the other nations of the Austro-Hungarian Empire and traditional Jewish cuisine. Celebrity chef and traveller, Joe Remblance explores the nuances of this cuisine in Budapest, the capital city, through local dishes such as Schnitzel, Gundel Palacsinta, Hungarian Lángos and Tokaji, a sweet Hungarian wine.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: Dramatic views of the Pacific Ocean, brightly colored colonial buildings, world-class cuisine – the capital city of Peru, Lima has a lot going for it. Milagros reveals the treasures of her home city from the diverse neighborhoods, like the upscale Miraflores to the bohemian Barranco. She also shows a side of Lima where one can enjoy fun adventures with the marine creatures.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Our host travels to Sintra, known for its castles and palaces. Learning and exploring about castles, he further travels to the historic town Obidos.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Seep visits the colorful Nubian villages on the west bank of the Nile, treasures of one of Africa's oldest and richest cultures.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra explores the rugged region of Leh, visiting Thiksey Monastery, Leh Palace and Shanti Stupa. Later she sets out for a five hour drive to the picturesque Pangong Lake and stays in the tent.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Travel enthusiast, Aradhana Jagota experiences the spiritual magnetism of Jerusalem, a holy city for Muslims, Christians and Jews.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: Salzburg, boasts a culinary scene as sensational as Mozart, the composer who was born here. Chef Joe Remblance enjoys some of its celebrated dishes.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Driek travels to Coimbra. Where he visits the Santa Cruz Church, a park and Santa Claire monastery. Concluding with a visit to Coimbra University.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Seep visits Luxor, where she is impressed by the magnificent monuments that have survived from Thebes, the capital of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: A 106 feet Buddha statue mesmerizes Alex as she explores Diskit Monastery in Nubra Valley. She tries the traditional ladakhi food and explores Leh city, by visiting Gurdwara Pathar Sahib and a school.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Amman, the capital of Jordan sits on a wealth of seven hills, a monotonous sea of white cement structures with the occasional minarets and buildings.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: The dining scene in Manchester has changed considerably over the last 20 years. Stuffy fine dining places have been replaced with street food and flavours from across the globe. Joe Remblance explores this cosmopolitan approach that has seeped into Manchester’s culinary scene though European dishes such as Black Pudding and Tzaziki, Asian dishes such as Chicken Curry and innovative dishes such as a fried chicken waffle pizza and deep-fried Cadbury Crème Eggs.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: Rafe visits Chefchaouen and is instantly besotted with the city, much to the confusion of the locals who are baffled by his eccentricities.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Driek today travels to Porto, surrounded by chapela, monasteries and churches. He visits a Wine cellar and learns about wine production of Portugal.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Alexandria in Egypt is a city that has reinvented itself over the centuries but has not forgotten its roots.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra explores Kargil, where she is invited for breakfast by the owner of a resort where she is putting up and understands the influence of the cultures on the locals.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Atlantis is designed to inspire awe, and the moment you step in, you find everything about it to be larger than life. It's here that your surreal dreams harmoniously blend into the unmatched luxury.

programme.title: Food Stories
programme.desc: Find out how the flavours of China have come to be such an integral part of the cuisine of Singapore.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: The imperial city of Fes, with its richly evocative attractions, makes Rafe feel like he is in a movie...with a plot twist right around the corner.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Our host travels to Douro Valley and is seen exploring vineyards and learning about the history behind it. Concluding his journey at Troia and Évora.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Rishikesh, the heartland of yoga, is widely known for mystical stories, spiritual awakenings, rejuvenation and peace. Travel enthusiast, Larissa D’Sa comes to Rishikesh looking for a relaxing getaway, and loses herself in its natural beauty. From relishing earthy Garhwali flavours to witnessing the larger-than-life Ganga aarti, her experiences in the land, where great sages and famous musicians came to find peace, help her to unwind.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alex explores Munshi Aziz Bhat Museum displaying the lives of the people, influenced by the traders and travels further on the way to Srinagar. She admires the beauty of Mt. Kun and Nun Kun glacier.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Rising graciously from the Arabian Gulf towards the azure sky, Atlantis, the Palm stands on the crescent of the iconic Palm Jumeirah. The exotic resort captures the world’s imagination with its mystical aura.

programme.title: Food STories Singapore
programme.desc: People of Indian ancestry comprise Singapore’s third-largest ethnic group, in fact, Singapore traces its origins to two Sanskrit words – ‘Singha’ or lion and ‘Pura’ or city. And yet, from fish head curry to Indian ‘Rojak’, Indian food in Singapore is something that confuses visitors from India. How did the “Indian” dishes of the Lion City come to be so distinct?

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: On reaching Zanskar, Alex visits Karsha Monastery, the largest one in Zanskar. She ends her stay after exploring the Sani Kanika Monastery, built in 17th century and the stupa.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: At Casablanca, Rafe draws hilarious connections between what he sees, and the 1942 Hollywood classic named after the city.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Frankfurt is the financial capital of the European Union. Kristina discovers that the city has much more to offer than just a good business meeting, as she learns about its history and architecture through its famous sights such as the Kaizerdom Cathedral and the Eltz Castle. She also goes to Rudesheim, where she encounters an amazing collection of data operated music instruments.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Elisha gets some old-world style pampering at Die Swaene, a luxury boutique hotel situated in the heart of the historic center of Bruges.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: From the fragrances at the Perfume Souk to a hot air balloon ride in the desert, Sabrina gets a taste of heritage and luxury at Madinat Jumeirah.

programme.title: Food STories Singapore
programme.desc: People of Indian ancestry comprise Singapore’s third-largest ethnic group, in fact, Singapore traces its origins to two Sanskrit words – ‘Singha’ or lion and ‘Pura’ or city. And yet, from fish head curry to Indian ‘Rojak’, Indian food in Singapore is something that confuses visitors from India. How did the “Indian” dishes of the Lion City come to be so distinct?

programme.desc: On reaching Zanskar, Alex visits Karsha Monastery, the largest one in Zanskar. She ends her stay after exploring the Sani Kanika Monastery, built in 17th century and the stupa.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: From the fragrances at the Perfume Souk to a hot air balloon ride in the desert, Sabrina gets a taste of heritage and luxury at Madinat Jumeirah.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è ancora in Bermuda, e questa volta oltre a preparare alcuni piatti con l' executive chef del "Griffin's Bistro" Pietro Casalicchio. Ornella visita le meraviglie dell'isola via mare.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Milano esattamente all'EXPO. Incontra un gruppo di ragazzi della regione Basilicata, che partecipano al progetto "Sano è Lucano", e hanno portato alcuni prodotti tipici della regione Basilicata, che Ornella utilizza per cucinare alcune ricette con Jasmin sulla barca, con Antonio alla libreria Mondadori di Milano, con Nicolò a "Lady Bu Bistrò", e con Fabio Pisani al ristorante stellato di Aimo e Nadia.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in una delle città più belle al mondo, Venezia, e visita il "Centurion Palace", dove incontra lo chef veneziano Massimo Livan al ristorante "Antinoo's Lounge". Con chef Massimo, Ornella prepara dei piatti ispirati ai dipinti d' arte moderna. Durante la visita al "Centurion Palace" incontra il General Manager Paolo Morra, e davanti ad un cocktail tutto veneziano Paolo racconta la storia di questo storico palazzo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in Florida ospite di un eccezionale evento organizzato da Ursula Avella Presidente di "Great Culinary Minds". L 'evento si è svolto al ristorante "Valentino Cucina Italiana". Ospite di Ornella è il talentuoso chef Mauro Uliassi, all'epoca 2 stelle Michelin, ora 3. Ospite d'eccezione di questa puntata il cantautore Raf che incontra Ornella su una spiaggia di Miami. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Brooklyn e visita il ristorante di Joe e chef Marco Chirico per preparare alcune specialità del ristorante. Prima di andare in cucina, Chef Marco preprare alcuni cocktail creati da lui, immaginate che chef Marco prepara i suoi liquori, come il limoncello e il mandarincello. La Happy hours al ristorante di Marco Polo è una combinazione di delizie tipiche italiane, formaggi e salumi ed una presentazione di frutti di mare, ostriche e gamberi.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado prosegue il suo viaggio culinario nel ristorante Enoteca, il ristorante si trova affianco a Marco Polo. Enoteca è il regno di Chef Marco Chirico, ed e` propio ad Enoteca che chef Marco prepara piatti sempre più originali come il Vulcano Pizza e il Cannolo Pizza (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista la regista e sceneggiatrice Lina Wertmüller. Prima donna nella storia ad essere candidata all' Oscar come miglior regista, Lina racconta il suo rapporto con grandi personaggi del cinema come Lelio Luttazzi e Federico Fellini.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Roma e visita nel cuore di Roma a Piazza Navona il ristorante stellato "Il Convivio di Troiani" dello Chef Massimo Troiani. Insieme allo Chef Daniele Lippi cucinano dei piatti gustosi, quanto raffinati. Ornella intervista Massimo Troiani e partecipa come "USA Ambassador " alla serata di gala "Eccellenze Italiane" presso "La Pergola" dei Cavalieri Hilton, intervistando Il re degli Chef Heniz Beck.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Raffaele Trovato, direttore dell'IFSE, a Piobesi Torinese, oltre a visitare la bellissima scuola, Ornella prepara delle ricette con l'istruttore del centro.(2009)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Tartufo" a Manayunk, poco distante da Filadelfia, dove incontra Al Del Bello, per preparare alcune ricette tipiche del ristorante. In questa puntata Ornella indossa i guanti da boxer per correre come Rocky Balboa sulla scalinata del museo d'arte di Filadelfia. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Al Del Bello al suo ristorante "Il Portico", uno dei ristoranti più raffinati di Filadelfia. Al racconta la sua storia di gratidudine nei confronti della famiglia Lattanzi proprietari di ristoratori italiani a New York. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è ancora in Bermuda, e questa volta oltre a preparare alcuni piatti con l' executive chef del "Griffin's Bistro" Pietro Casalicchio. Ornella visita le meraviglie dell'isola via mare.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Milano esattamente all'EXPO. Incontra un gruppo di ragazzi della regione Basilicata, che partecipano al progetto "Sano è Lucano", e hanno portato alcuni prodotti tipici della regione Basilicata, che Ornella utilizza per cucinare alcune ricette con Jasmin sulla barca, con Antonio alla libreria Mondadori di Milano, con Nicolò a "Lady Bu Bistrò", e con Fabio Pisani al ristorante stellato di Aimo e Nadia.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in una delle città più belle al mondo, Venezia, e visita il "Centurion Palace", dove incontra lo chef veneziano Massimo Livan al ristorante "Antinoo's Lounge". Con chef Massimo, Ornella prepara dei piatti ispirati ai dipinti d' arte moderna. Durante la visita al "Centurion Palace" incontra il General Manager Paolo Morra, e davanti ad un cocktail tutto veneziano Paolo racconta la storia di questo storico palazzo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova in Florida ospite di un eccezionale evento organizzato da Ursula Avella Presidente di "Great Culinary Minds". L 'evento si è svolto al ristorante "Valentino Cucina Italiana". Ospite di Ornella è il talentuoso chef Mauro Uliassi, all'epoca 2 stelle Michelin, ora 3. Ospite d'eccezione di questa puntata il cantautore Raf che incontra Ornella su una spiaggia di Miami. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Brooklyn e visita il ristorante di Joe e chef Marco Chirico per preparare alcune specialità del ristorante. Prima di andare in cucina, Chef Marco preprare alcuni cocktail creati da lui, immaginate che chef Marco prepara i suoi liquori, come il limoncello e il mandarincello. La Happy hours al ristorante di Marco Polo è una combinazione di delizie tipiche italiane, formaggi e salumi ed una presentazione di frutti di mare, ostriche e gamberi.(2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado prosegue il suo viaggio culinario nel ristorante Enoteca, il ristorante si trova affianco a Marco Polo. Enoteca è il regno di Chef Marco Chirico, ed e` propio ad Enoteca che chef Marco prepara piatti sempre più originali come il Vulcano Pizza e il Cannolo Pizza (2015)

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)
